forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Becoming cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sunny. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:10am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the east, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 24.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 20.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower east of Stuart Highway, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly and light increasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 23.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 24.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Leigh Creek in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers north of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
